nasb.text: Then the heads of households of the Levites approached Eleazar the priest, and Joshua the son of Nun, and the heads of households of the tribes of the sons of Israel.

esv.text: Then the heads of the fathers’ houses of the Levites came to Eleazar the priest and to Joshua the son of Nun and to the heads of the fathers’ houses of the tribes of the people of Israel.

cnv.text: 那時，利未人的眾族長來到以利亞撒祭司和嫩的兒子約書亞，以及以色列眾支派的族長那裡，
